svg.text: Expand Program -> IDENT AssignOp Expr StmtTail EOF
Expand StmtTail -> FOR IDENT IN Expr COLON ForBody StmtTail
Expand Term -> RANGE LPAREN Expr COMMA Expr RangeStepOpt RPAREN Term'
Panic pop: terminal mismatch, pop 'COLON' while seeing 'NEWLINE'
Expand ForBody -> NEWLINE INDENT StmtList DEDENT
Expand StmtList -> IDENT AssignOp Expr StmtTail
Expand StmtTail -> PRINT LPAREN Expr RPAREN StmtTail
Panic pop: terminal mismatch, pop 'RPAREN' while seeing 'NEWLINE'
Expand StmtTail -> PRINT LPAREN Expr RPAREN StmtTail
Expand StmtTail -> IF Expr COLON NEWLINE INDENT StmtList DEDENT ElseOpt StmtTail
Panic pop: terminal mismatch, pop 'COLON' while seeing 'NEWLINE'
Expand StmtList -> PRINT LPAREN Expr RPAREN StmtTail
Expand ElseOpt -> ELSE COLON NEWLINE INDENT StmtList DEDENT
Expand StmtList -> PRINT LPAREN Expr RPAREN StmtTail
Expand StmtTail -> IDENT AssignOp Expr StmtTail
Panic pop: pop non-terminal 'Expr' on lookahead 'NEWLINE'
